headline: UP-NS say revised merger application is ‘comprehensive and complete’
summary: Union Pacific and Norfolk Southern defended their revised merger application, calling it "comprehensive and complete" while rebutting calls for its rejection. The post UP-NS say revised merger application is ‘comprehensive and complete’ appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: Union Pacific Corporation CEO Jim Vena and CFO Jennifer Hamann to Address the Wolfe Research 19th Annual Global Transportation & Industrials Conference
summary: OMAHA, Neb., May 13, 2026--Jim Vena, chief executive officer and Jennifer Hamann, executive vice president and chief financial officer, of Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE: UNP) will address the Wolfe Research 19th Annual Global Transportation & Industrials Conference on Wednesday, May 20, 2026, at 9:50 a.m. ET.

headline: Is Union Pacific (UNP) Pricing Reflect Its DCF And P E Signals After Recent Gains
summary: If you have ever looked at Union Pacific and wondered whether the current share price really reflects its value, this breakdown is for you. With the stock recently closing at US$265.60 and returns of 0.6% over 7 days, 6.0% over 30 days, 14.5% year to date and 19.1% over 1 year, valuation is front of mind for many shareholders. Recent headlines around Union Pacific have focused on the company’s position within U.S. rail transportation and its role in supporting freight activity across the...
